rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.159, which addresses immunity from liability for school districts and concussion oversight teams.
quote:
This subchapter does not:
(1) waive any immunity from liability of a school district or open-enrollment charter school or of district or charter school officers or employees;
_note: Rule text concerns concussion oversight team immunity; no overlap with homestead exemption policy.
